utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: This is the unit for you , my friend . Sturdy construction , tons of storage compartments , some big enough to fit a grown man .

utterances.speaker: Joey

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Sometimes I get in here just to get away from it !
